topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: AI Chat must answer spending/category questions using synced mirror transactions (922+ in production); get_transactions tool must return meaningful aggregates for the requested period—not responses claiming no expenses or unavailable data when sync entity counts show transactions loaded.

backend/src/ai/tools/transactions.rs get_transactions; backend/src/transactions/repository.rs aggregates_by_category; backend/src/firefly/mod.rs sync_transactions + db upsert_transaction (category_id never written); AI orchestrator tool result → LLM interpretation; optional privacy allow_raw_transactions=false aggregate shape.

US-0006 AI tool layer; privacy TOML allow_raw_transactions=false returns aggregates only (DEC-0032); do not expose raw rows to model by default; BUG-0004 L (forecast/wealth empty) related but distinct surface—AI chat tool path; German operator UI example at 23:30:13; do not read .env secrets.

Reproduce: ask AI about current-month category spending after successful Firefly sync; audit log shows get_transactions with period args; tool JSON includes non-zero transaction_count or explicit totals for period; compare GET /api/v1/sync/entities transaction count vs aggregate query; fix verification: category_id populated from Firefly payload or uncategorized bucket surfaced; regression: privacy redaction unchanged.

Operator confirms AI no longer claims no expenses/unavailable data when mirror has transactions for queried month; get_transactions returns usable category/month aggregates; BUG-0006 acceptance rows P+Q+R pass; discovery documents root cause (sync mapping vs date window vs amount sign vs empty tool contract).

decomposition.rationale: Operator-reported AI chat failure with get_transactions tool (German no-expenses message) despite 922 synced transactions; sub-defects P (empty/misleading tool output), Q (sync category_id gap), R (aggregate contract/LLM interpretation) share AI↔mirror data path.
alternatives_considered: Merge into BUG-0004 L — rejected: BUG-0004 L targets forecast/wealth/Grafana UI; AI get_transactions is US-0006 tool-layer defect with distinct code path
US story for AI data quality — rejected: defect-shaped; mirror rows exist but tool/aggregates unusable today
